changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 6

changeSet.comment: Create Processing and Quality Control page for MNTD Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Execute lab processes and verify sample integrity through quality control checks. Record processing execution data: Protocol used (DNA Extraction, RNA Extraction, PCR Amplification, ELISA, Microscopy, RDT, Culture, Sequencing), Start and end time, Technician name. Record QC results: Pass or Fail, QC metrics (Ct value, Yield in ng/uL, Integrity RIN/DV200, other metrics). If QC fails, select action: Re-extract, Re-run, or Discard. System updates status to Processed - QC Passed or Processed - QC Failed and handles automatic branching for rework samples.

column.name: content
column.value: {"pageDescription":"Processing and Quality Control","dataPoints":{"processingExecution":{"protocol":{"type":"choice","label":"Protocol Used","options":["DNA Extraction","RNA Extraction","PCR Amplification","ELISA","Microscopy","RDT","Culture","Sequencing","Other"],"required":true},"startDateTime":{"type":"dateTime","label":"Start Date/Time","required":true},"endDateTime":{"type":"dateTime","label":"End Date/Time","required":false},"technician":{"type":"text","label":"Technician","required":true},"processingNotes":{"type":"text","label":"Processing Notes","multiline":true,"required":false}},"qualityControl":{"qcResult":{"type":"choice","label":"QC Result","options":["Pass","Fail"],"required":true},"ctValue":{"type":"number","label":"Ct Value","min":0,"step":0.1,"required":false},"yield":{"type":"number","label":"Yield (ng/uL)","required":false},"integrity":{"type":"text","label":"Integrity (RIN/DV200)","required":false},"otherMetrics":{"type":"text","label":"Other Metrics","required":false},"qcTechnician":{"type":"text","label":"QC Technician","required":false},"qcDate":{"type":"date","label":"QC Date","required":false},"qcNotes":{"type":"text","label":"QC Notes","multiline":true,"required":false}},"failedDecision":{"action":{"type":"choice","label":"Action if Failed","options":["Re-extract","Re-run","Discard"],"conditionalOn":"qcResult == Fail","required":false}}},"systemActions":["Update sample status: Processed - QC Passed","Update sample status: Processed - QC Failed","Automatic branching for rework"],"bulkOperations":{"enabled":true,"applyToSelected":["protocol","startDateTime","endDateTime","technician","qcResult","qcTechnician","qcDate"]},"nextPage":"Test Assignment and Machine Scheduling"}

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 6

changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'MNTD' AND display_order = 6

changeSet.comment: Insert MNTD Processing and QC workflow page template

column.name: description
column.value: Execute lab processes and verify sample integrity through quality control checks

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Record processing execution: Protocol used, Start/End time, Technician. Record QC results: Pass/Fail, QC metrics (Ct value, Yield, Integrity). If failed, select action: Re-extract, Re-run, or Discard. System updates status accordingly.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Processing and Quality Control - Lab process execution and QC verification
